id: conduct a survey to understand students better
intention: 进行一项调查来更好地了解学生
naturalChunk: conduct a survey to understand students better
avoidSaying: conducting survey to realize his students
sentencePatterns: My teacher is conducting a survey to ...
We are conducting a survey to understand ...
realLifeExamples: My teacher is conducting a survey to understand his students better.
The company is conducting a survey to understand its users better.
usageNotes: realize = 意识到/突然明白，不等于'了解'。想表达'了解某人/某事'时，优先用 understand 或 get to know。conduct a survey 是固定搭配，survey 前要有 a。
productionPrompts: 用 We are conducting a survey to understand ... 造一句和学生、用户或团队有关的英文句子。
